log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Githzerai — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Githzerai — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Githzerai — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 15] HIT! 15 damage. Githzerai — Unarmored Caster HP: 52/67
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 15] HIT! 19 damage. Githzerai — Unarmored Caster HP: 33/67
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 15] HIT! 12 damage. Githzerai — Unarmored Caster HP: 21/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Githzerai — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 21/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Githzerai — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Githzerai — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 15] HIT! 8 damage. Githzerai — Unarmored Caster HP: 13/67
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 15] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 15] MISS.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Githzerai — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 13/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (13/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Githzerai — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Githzerai — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Githzerai — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 15] HIT! 21 damage. Githzerai — Unarmored Caster HP: -8/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
══ ROUND 1 ══
